meta.title: 4D Calculus — A+ Lift Canon and Full Liminal Mapping Law
meta.description: A+ is the full expansion phase of a source lattice before lawful reweave. The canon pipeline: populate -> cultivate zero/aether -> gearclock map -> poi overlay -> nexus extract -> irrational transform -> codify -> collapse to A+/Z* -> reweave into next carrier.
meta.key_insight: A source lattice is not rewoven until fully populated across 15 masks, 4 orbit states, 12 archetype modes, and 29 liminal refinement bands (334,080 microstates per site). Every nonempty subset generates zero and aether candidates.

pipeline.name: Populate
pipeline.operation: Fully populate the source lattice across all masks, orbits, archetypes, and scale bands

pipeline.name: Cultivate Z/A
pipeline.operation: Cultivate every lawful zero-point and aether-point possibility

pipeline.name: GearClockMap
pipeline.operation: Place the full field onto a circular gearclock with exact angular coordinates

pipeline.name: PoiOverlay_2
pipeline.operation: Overlap every lawful 2-circle poi pattern in shared refinement frames

pipeline.name: NexusExtract
pipeline.operation: Extract and codify every nexus point with unique signatures

pipeline.name: IrrationalTransform
pipeline.operation: Transform the known map under fixed irrational rubric to observe alternative orderings

pipeline.name: Codify
pipeline.operation: Codify the whole thing into an exact lookup system

pipeline.name: Collapse
pipeline.operation: Collapse constructive field into A+ pole and neutral field into Z*

pipeline.name: Reweave
pipeline.operation: Compress into dense carrier as next source lattice (only after closure)

a_plus_lift_canon.canon_statement: A+ = maximum constructive expansion; Z* = absolute neutral collapse; reweave = dense lawful carrier rebuilt from completed map; canon valid only if whole pipeline closes and replays

fifteen_canonical_masks.description: Nonempty subsets of {Square, Flower, Cloud, Fractal} = first stable nonempty subset-lattice of the crystal

orbit_quartet.description: Smallest orbit circuit that simultaneously tracks all four properties

shell_crystal_counts.raw_shell: 15 masks x 4 orbit states = 60 raw shell crystals

liminal_coordinate_grammar.formula: Lambda(xi) = <Addr, mu, q, epsilon, chi, kappa, p, n, theta, nu, sigma, psi, tau_A, tau_B, Z-sig, A-sig, N-sig, W-sig, Pi>

components.meaning: Transform word for witness channel A
Transform word for witness channel B
State class: RAW | ZERO | AETHER | NEXUS | DENSE

outer_clock.description: 60-notch outer clock from 15 masks x 4 orbit states

micro_notch.formula: n_kappa(mu, q, p) = kappa * n(mu, q) + p
micro_notch.angle_formula: theta(mu, q, kappa, p) = 2*pi / (60*kappa) * n_kappa(mu, q, p)
micro_notch.description: Exact circular position for every microstate

gearclock_mapping.principle: The shell is not just organized like a circle — it IS exactly a circular clockwork with explicit angular coordinates

poi_overlay_law.nexus_condition: t_i === t_j + delta_t (mod 60*L) for legal offset delta_t
poi_overlay_law.poi_pattern: P_2 = <C_i, C_j, delta_t, sigma, psi, mode>
poi_overlay_law.nexus_set: N(P_2) = set of all nexus points generated by this pattern

nexus_types.description: Only aligns after collapse through zero family
Only becomes exact in dense carrier form

zero_cultivation.exhaustive_family: Z(U) = Dedup({Z(V) | empty != V subset U}) — every nonempty subset collapses

aether_cultivation.exhaustive_family: A(U) = Dedup({A(V) | empty != V subset U})

irrational_transform.principle: Does not change topology; changes the salience ordering of the same topology. Each irrational produces a different observation of the same holographic map.
irrational_transform.feature_vector: f(xi) = (m, o, a, s, h, z, u, x, c, r) — mask complexity, orbit rank, archetype rank, scale depth, phase fraction, zero-depth, aether-coherence, nexus degree, corridor admissibility, replay/witness complexity

strand_weights.edge_feature: g(e) = (Delta_theta, Delta_kappa, Delta_q, Delta_a, Delta_z, Delta_u, Delta_x, Delta_r)

closure_conditions: No new unique zero signatures appear
No new unique aether signatures appear
No new lawful nexus signatures appear
Dense reweave returns canonical lookup-equivalent carrier

a_plus_and_z_star_poles.route_requirement: Every route must say: what local zero family it came through, what local aether family, whether it contributes to Z* and/or A+_star

reweave_law.precondition: No reweave is legal before full mapping closure
reweave_law.definition: Reweave(L_0) = DenseCarrier(M, Z, A, N, R, W)
reweave_law.recursion: L_next = Reweave(A+(L_0)) — then same law runs again

dual_witness_law.requirement: For any codified state xi, the map must store W(xi) = (tau_A(xi)(A_0), tau_B(xi)(B_0))
dual_witness_law.law: A coordinate is not fully mapped unless it says exactly how both witness channels have changed there

combination_masks.storage: Each zero/aether point stored with: occupancy mask that produced it, invariant signature, witness channel transforms, resulting liminal weight vector

navigation_laws.affinity_ride: d_aff(i,j) = |V_i - V_j| — move to nearest crystals in vibe space
navigation_laws.opposition_ride: Mirror or inverse along one register, holding others steady — finds tension partners and shadow complements
navigation_laws.threshold_ride: Move along liminal register Z_n preserving engine and name — finds gates, trials, lawful crossings
navigation_laws.remedy_ride: j = argmin_j |sh_i - md_j| — move to crystal whose medicine best compensates current shadow
